tEn: BEiT: BERT Pre-Training of Image Transformers
sEn: BEiT introduces masked image modeling for self-supervised vision Transformer pre-training, achieving competitive results on image classification and segmentation.
sZh: BEiT提出掩码图像建模用于视觉Transformer自监督预训练，在图像分类和分割上取得有竞争力的结果。
absEn: We introduce a self-supervised vision representation model BEiT, which stands for Bidirectional Encoder representation from Image Transformers. Following BERT developed in the natural language processing area, we propose a masked image modeling task to pretrain vision Transformers. Specifically, each image has two views in our pre-training, i.e, image patches (such as 16x16 pixels), and visual tokens (i.e., discrete tokens). We first "tokenize" the original image into visual tokens. Then we randomly mask some image patches and fed them into the backbone Transformer. The pre-training objective is to recover the original visual tokens based on the corrupted image patches. After pre-training BEiT, we directly fine-tune the model parameters on downstream tasks by appending task layers upon the pretrained encoder. Experimental results on image classification and semantic segmentation show that our model achieves competitive results with previous pre-training methods. For example, base-size BEiT achieves 83.2% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K, significantly outperforming from-scratch DeiT training (81.8%) with the same setup. Moreover, large-size BEiT obtains 86.3% only using ImageNet-1K, even outperforming ViT-L with supervised pre-training on ImageNet-22K (85.2%). The code and pretrained models are available at https://aka.ms/beit.
absZh: 我们提出了一种自监督视觉表示模型BEiT，即来自图像Transformer的双向编码器表示。借鉴自然语言处理领域的BERT，我们提出了一种掩码图像建模任务来预训练视觉Transformer。具体来说，每张图像在预训练中有两种视图：图像块（如16x16像素）和视觉标记（即离散标记）。我们首先将原始图像“标记化”为视觉标记，然后随机掩码一些图像块并将其输入骨干Transformer。预训练目标是根据被破坏的图像块恢复原始视觉标记。预训练BEiT后，我们通过在预训练编码器上附加任务层直接在下游任务上微调模型参数。在图像分类和语义分割上的实验结果表明，我们的模型取得了与先前预训练方法相竞争的结果。例如，基础大小的BEiT在ImageNet-1K上达到83.2%的top-1准确率，显著优于相同设置下从头训练的DeiT（81.8%）。此外，大型BEiT仅使用ImageNet-1K就达到86.3%，甚至超过了在ImageNet-22K上进行监督预训练的ViT-L（85.2%）。代码和预训练模型可在https://aka.ms/beit获取。

contrib.en: Proposes masked image modeling (MIM) to pretrain vision Transformers in a self-supervised manner.
contrib.zh: 提出掩码图像建模（MIM）以自监督方式预训练视觉Transformer。

contrib.en: Provides a theoretical explanation of MIM from the perspective of variational autoencoder.
contrib.zh: 从变分自编码器角度为MIM提供理论解释。

contrib.en: Pretrains BEiT and conducts extensive fine-tuning on image classification and semantic segmentation.
contrib.zh: 预训练BEiT并在图像分类和语义分割上开展广泛微调实验。

contrib.en: Shows self-attention in BEiT learns to distinguish semantic regions and object boundaries without human annotation.
contrib.zh: 展示BEiT的自注意力机制无需人工标注即可区分语义区域和物体边界。

contrib.en: Achieves competitive results: BEiT-Base 83.2% top-1 on ImageNet-1K, outperforming DeiT (81.8%).
contrib.zh: 取得有竞争力的结果：BEiT-Base在ImageNet-1K上达到83.2% top-1准确率，优于DeiT（81.8%）。

contrib.en: Large-size BEiT achieves 86.3% on ImageNet-1K, surpassing ViT-L with supervised pre-training on ImageNet-22K (85.2%).
contrib.zh: 大型BEiT在ImageNet-1K上达到86.3%，超越在ImageNet-22K上监督预训练的ViT-L（85.2%）。

limits.en: Pre-training requires a separate image tokenizer (dVAE) trained on additional data.
limits.zh: 预训练需要额外的图像分词器（dVAE）在额外数据上训练。

limits.en: Masked image modeling may still focus on low-level details despite using discrete tokens.
limits.zh: 尽管使用离散词符，掩码图像建模仍可能关注低级细节。

limits.en: Performance gains are demonstrated mainly on ImageNet and ADE20K; generalizability to other tasks is not fully explored.
limits.zh: 性能提升主要在ImageNet和ADE20K上展示；对其他任务的泛化性未充分探索。

limits.en: The method relies on blockwise masking strategy; other masking strategies may yield different results.
limits.zh: 该方法依赖块状掩码策略；其他掩码策略可能产生不同结果。

limits.en: Pre-training is computationally expensive (500k steps on 16 GPUs for 5 days).
limits.zh: 预训练计算成本高（16块GPU上500k步需5天）。

items.en: We introduce a self-supervised vision representation model BEiT, which stands for Bidirectional Encoder representation from Image Transformers. Following BERT [13] developed in the natural language processing area, we propose a masked image modeling task to pretrain vision Transformers. Specifically, each image has two views in our pre-training, i.e., image patches (such as 16×16161616\times 16 pixels), and visual tokens (i.e., discrete tokens). We first “tokenize” the original image into visual tokens. Then we randomly mask some image patches and fed them into the backbone Transformer. The pre-training objective is to recover the original visual tokens based on the corrupted image patches. After pre-training BEiT, we directly fine-tune the model parameters on downstream tasks by appending task layers upon the pretrained encoder. Experimental results on image classification and semantic segmentation show that our model achieves competitive results with previous pre-training methods.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种自监督视觉表示模型 BEiT，即来自图像Transformer的双向编码器表示。遵循自然语言处理领域开发的 BERT [13]，我们提出了一种掩码图像建模任务来预训练视觉Transformer。具体来说，在我们的预训练中，每张图像有两个视图，即图像块（例如 16×16 像素）和视觉标记（即离散标记）。我们首先将原始图像“标记化”为视觉标记。然后我们随机掩码一些图像块，并将它们输入到骨干Transformer中。预训练的目标是基于损坏的图像块恢复原始视觉标记。预训练 BEiT 后，我们通过在预训练编码器上附加任务层，直接在下游任务上微调模型参数。在图像分类和语义分割上的实验结果表明，我们的模型取得了与先前预训练方法相竞争的结果。

items.en: Transformer [42] has achieved promising performance in computer vision [12, 38]. However, empirical studies show that vision Transformers require more training data than convolutional neural networks. In order to solve the data-hungry issue [27], self-supervised pre-training is a promising solution to leverage large-scale image data. Several strands of methods have been explored for vision Transformers, such as contrastive learning [11, 44], and self-distillation [10].
items.zh: Transformer [42] 在计算机视觉中取得了有前景的性能 [12, 38]。然而，实证研究表明视觉Transformer比卷积神经网络需要更多的训练数据。为了解决数据饥饿问题 [27]，自监督预训练是利用大规模图像数据的一个有前景的解决方案。已经探索了几种用于视觉Transformer的方法，例如对比学习 [11, 44] 和自蒸馏 [10]。

items.en: Concurrently, BERT [13] has achieved great success in natural language processing. Its masked language modeling task first randomly masks some proportion of tokens within a text, and then recovers the masked tokens based on the Transformer encoding results of the corrupted text. Motivated by BERT, we turn to the denoising auto-encoding idea to pretrain vision Transformers, which has not been well studied by the vision community. It is challenging to directly apply BERT-style pre-training for image data. First of all, there is no pre-exist vocabulary for vision Transformer’s input unit, i.e., image patches. So we cannot simply employ a softmax classifier to predict over all possible candidates for masked patches. In contrast, the language vocabulary, such as words and BPE [37], is well-defined and eases auto-encoding prediction. A straightforward alternative is regarding the task as a regression problem, which predicts the raw pixels of masked patches. However, such pixel-level recovery task tends to waste modeling capability on pre-training short-range dependencies and high-frequency details [34]. Our goal is to overcome the above issues for pre-training of vision Transformers.
items.zh: 同时，BERT [13] 在自然语言处理中取得了巨大成功。其掩码语言建模任务首先随机掩码文本中的一定比例的标记，然后基于损坏文本的Transformer编码结果恢复被掩码的标记。受 BERT 启发，我们转向去噪自编码思想来预训练视觉Transformer，这在视觉社区尚未得到充分研究。直接将 BERT 风格的预训练应用于图像数据是具有挑战性的。首先，视觉Transformer的输入单元（即图像块）没有预先存在的词汇表。因此，我们不能简单地使用 softmax 分类器来预测被掩码块的所有可能候选。相比之下，语言词汇表（例如单词和 BPE [37]）定义良好，简化了自编码预测。一个直接的替代方案是将任务视为回归问题，预测被掩码块的原始像素。然而，这种像素级恢复任务倾向于浪费预训练短程依赖和高频细节的建模能力 [34]。我们的目标是克服上述问题，用于视觉Transformer的预训练。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Overview of BEiT pre-training. Before pre-training, we learn an “image tokenizer” via autoencoding-style reconstruction, where an image is tokenized into discrete visual tokens according to the learned vocabulary. During pre-training, each image has two views, i.e., image patches, and visual tokens. We randomly mask some proportion of image patches ( graygray patches in the figure) and replace them with a special mask embedding [M]. Then the patches are fed to a backbone vision Transformer. The pre-training task aims at predicting the visual tokens of the original image based on the encoding vectors of the corrupted image.
items.capZh: 图 1：BEiT 预训练概述。在预训练之前，我们通过自编码风格的重建学习一个“图像标记器”，其中图像根据学习的词汇表被标记化为离散的视觉标记。在预训练期间，每张图像有两个视图，即图像块和视觉标记。我们随机掩码一定比例的图像块（图中的灰色块），并用特殊的掩码嵌入 [M] 替换它们。然后将这些块输入到骨干视觉Transformer中。预训练任务旨在基于损坏图像的编码向量预测原始图像的视觉标记。

items.en: In this work, we introduce a self-supervised vision representation model BEiT, which stands for Bidirectional Encoder representation from Image Transformers. Inspired by BERT, we propose a pre-training task, namely, masked image modeling (MIM). As shown in Figure 1, MIM uses two views for each images, i.e., image patches, and visual tokens. We split the image into a grid of patches that are the input representation of backbone Transformer. Moreover, we “tokenize” the image to discrete visual tokens, which is obtained by the latent codes of discrete VAE [34]. During pre-training, we randomly mask some proportion of image patches, and feed the corrupted input to Transformer. The model learns to recover the visual tokens of the original image, instead of the raw pixels of masked patches.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们引入了一种自监督视觉表示模型 BEiT，即来自图像Transformer的双向编码器表示。受 BERT 启发，我们提出了一种预训练任务，即掩码图像建模（MIM）。如图 1 所示，MIM 为每张图像使用两个视图，即图像块和视觉标记。我们将图像分割成网格块，这些块是骨干Transformer的输入表示。此外，我们将图像“标记化”为离散的视觉标记，这些标记由离散 VAE [34] 的潜在码获得。在预训练期间，我们随机掩码一定比例的图像块，并将损坏的输入馈送到Transformer。模型学习恢复原始图像的视觉标记，而不是被掩码块的原始像素。

items.en: We perform self-supervised learning and then fine-tune the pretrained BEiT on two downstream tasks, i.e., image classification, and semantic segmentation. Experimental results indicate that BEiT outperforms both from-scratch training and previous strong self-supervised models. Moreover, BEiT is complementary to supervised pre-training. Performance of BEiT can be further improved by intermediate fine-tuning with ImageNet labels. Ablation studies show that our proposed techniques are critical to the effectiveness of BERT-style pre-training for image data. Apart from performance, the improvements of convergence speed and stability of fine-tuning reduce training costs on end tasks. In addition, we demonstrate that self-supervised BEiT can learn reasonable semantic regions via pre-training, unleashing the rich supervision signals contained in images.
items.zh: 我们进行自监督学习，然后在两个下游任务（即图像分类和语义分割）上微调预训练的 BEiT。实验结果表明，BEiT 优于从头训练和先前强大的自监督模型。此外，BEiT 与监督预训练互补。通过使用 ImageNet 标签进行中间微调，可以进一步提高 BEiT 的性能。消融研究表明，我们提出的技术对于 BERT 风格预训练在图像数据上的有效性至关重要。除了性能之外，微调的收敛速度和稳定性的改进降低了最终任务的训练成本。此外，我们证明了自监督 BEiT 可以通过预训练学习合理的语义区域，释放图像中包含的丰富监督信号。

items.en: Our contributions are summarized as follows:
items.zh: 我们的贡献总结如下：

items.en: We propose a masked image modeling task to pretrain vision Transformers in a self-supervised manner. We also provide a theoretical explanation from the perspective of variational autoencoder.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种掩码图像建模任务，以自监督方式预训练视觉Transformer。我们还从变分自编码器的角度提供了理论解释。

items.en: We pretrain BEiT and conduct extensive fine-tuning experiments on downstream tasks, such as image classification, and semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 我们预训练了 BEiT，并在下游任务（如图像分类和语义分割）上进行了广泛的微调实验。

items.en: We present that the self-attention mechanism of self-supervised BEiT learns to distinguish semantic regions and object boundaries, although without using any human annotation.
items.zh: 我们展示了自监督 BEiT 的自注意力机制学会了区分语义区域和物体边界，尽管没有使用任何人工标注。

items.en: Given an input image x𝑥x, BEiT encodes it to contextualized vector representations. As shown in Figure 1, BEiT is pretrained by the masked image modeling (MIM) task in a self-supervised learning manner. MIM aims at recovering the masked image patches based on encoding vectors. For downstream tasks (such as image classification, and semantic segmentation), we append task layers upon pretrained BEiT and fine-tune the parameters on the specific datasets.
items.zh: 给定输入图像 x，BEiT 将其编码为上下文化的向量表示。如图 1 所示，BEiT 通过掩码图像建模（MIM）任务以自监督学习方式进行预训练。MIM 旨在基于编码向量恢复被掩码的图像块。对于下游任务（如图像分类和语义分割），我们在预训练的 BEiT 上附加任务层，并在特定数据集上微调参数。

items.en: The images have two views of representations in our method, namely, image patch, and visual tokens. The two types serve as input and output representations during pre-training, respectively.
items.zh: 在我们的方法中，图像有两种表示视图，即图像块和视觉标记。这两种类型在预训练期间分别作为输入和输出表示。

items.en: The 2D image is split into a sequence of patches [12], so that a standard Transformer can directly accept image data. Formally, we reshape the image 𝒙∈ℝH×W×C𝒙superscriptℝ𝐻𝑊𝐶{\bm{x}}\in\mathbb{R}^{H\times W\times C} into N=H​W/P2𝑁𝐻𝑊superscript𝑃2N={HW}/{P^{2}} patches 𝒙p∈ℝN×(P2​C)superscript𝒙𝑝superscriptℝ𝑁superscript𝑃2𝐶{\bm{x}}^{p}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times(P^{2}C)}, where C𝐶C is the number of channels, (H,W)𝐻𝑊(H,W) is the input image resolution, and (P,P)𝑃𝑃(P,P) is the resolution of each patch. The image patches {𝒙ip}i=1Nsuperscriptsubscriptsubscriptsuperscript𝒙𝑝𝑖𝑖1𝑁\{{\bm{x}}^{p}_{i}\}_{i=1}^{N} are flattened into vectors and are linearly projected, which is similar to word embeddings in BERT [13]. Image patches preserve raw pixels and are used as input features in BEiT.
items.zh: 2D 图像被分割成一系列块 [12]，以便标准Transformer可以直接接受图像数据。形式上，我们将图像 x ∈ ℝ^{H×W×C} 重塑为 N = HW/P^2 个块 x^p ∈ ℝ^{N×(P^2C)}，其中 C 是通道数，(H,W) 是输入图像分辨率，(P,P) 是每个块的分辨率。图像块 {x^p_i}_{i=1}^N 被展平为向量并进行线性投影，类似于 BERT [13] 中的词嵌入。图像块保留原始像素，并用作 BEiT 中的输入特征。

items.en: In our experiments, we split each 224×224224224224\times 224 image into a 14×14141414\times 14 grid of image patches, where each patch is 16×16161616\times 16.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，我们将每张 224×224 图像分割成 14×14 的图像块网格，其中每个块为 16×16。

items.en: Similar to natural language, we represent the image as a sequence of discrete tokens obtained by an “image tokenizer”, instead of raw pixels. Specifically, we tokenize the image 𝒙∈ℝH×W×C𝒙superscriptℝ𝐻𝑊𝐶{\bm{x}}\in\mathbb{R}^{H\times W\times C} into 𝒛=[z1,…,zN]∈𝒱h×w𝒛subscript𝑧1…subscript𝑧𝑁superscript𝒱ℎ𝑤{\bm{z}}=[z_{1},\dots,z_{N}]\in\mathcal{V}^{h\times w}, where the vocabulary 𝒱={1,…,|𝒱|}𝒱1…𝒱\mathcal{V}=\{1,\dots,|\mathcal{V}|\} contains discrete token indices.
items.zh: 类似于自然语言，我们将图像表示为通过“图像标记器”获得的离散标记序列，而不是原始像素。具体来说，我们将图像 x ∈ ℝ^{H×W×C} 标记化为 z = [z_1, …, z_N] ∈ 𝒱^{h×w}，其中词汇表 𝒱 = {1, …, |𝒱|} 包含离散标记索引。

items.en: Following [34], we use the image tokenizer learned by discrete variational autoencoder (dVAE). There are two modules during visual token learning, namely, tokenizer and decoder. The tokenizer qϕ​(𝒛|𝒙)subscript𝑞italic-ϕconditional𝒛𝒙q_{\phi}({\bm{z}}|{\bm{x}}) maps image pixels 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}} into discrete tokens 𝒛𝒛{\bm{z}} according to a visual codebook (i.e., vocabulary). The decoder pψ​(𝒙|𝒛)subscript𝑝𝜓conditional𝒙𝒛p_{\psi}({\bm{x}}|{\bm{z}}) learns to reconstruct the input image 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}} based on the visual tokens 𝒛𝒛{\bm{z}}. The reconstruction objective can be written as 𝔼𝒛∼qϕ​(𝐳|𝒙)​[log⁡pψ​(𝒙|𝒛)]subscript𝔼similar-to𝒛subscript𝑞italic-ϕconditional𝐳𝒙delimited-[]subscript𝑝𝜓conditional𝒙𝒛\mathbb{E}_{{\bm{z}}\sim q_{\phi}({\mathbf{z}}|{\bm{x}})}[\log p_{\psi}({\bm{x}}|{\bm{z}})]. Because the latent visual tokens are discrete, the model training is non-differentiable. Gumbel-softmax relaxation [20, 29] is employed to train the model parameters. Moreover, a uniform prior is put on qϕsubscript𝑞italic-ϕq_{\phi} during dVAE training. Refer to [34] for more training details of the image tokenizer.
items.zh: 遵循 [34]，我们使用由离散变分自编码器（dVAE）学习的图像标记器。在视觉标记学习过程中有两个模块，即标记器和解码器。标记器 q_ϕ(z|x) 根据视觉码本（即词汇表）将图像像素 x 映射为离散标记 z。解码器 p_ψ(x|z) 学习基于视觉标记 z 重建输入图像 x。重建目标可以写为 𝔼_{z∼q_ϕ(z|x)}[log p_ψ(x|z)]。由于潜在视觉标记是离散的，模型训练是不可微的。采用 Gumbel-softmax 松弛 [20, 29] 来训练模型参数。此外，在 dVAE 训练期间，对 q_ϕ 施加均匀先验。有关图像标记器的更多训练细节，请参考 [34]。

items.en: We tokenize each image to a 14×14141414\times 14 grid of visual tokens. Notice the number of visual tokens and the number of image patches for one image are the same. The vocabulary size is set to |𝒱|=8192𝒱8192|\mathcal{V}|=8192. In our work, we directly use the publicly available111https://github.com/openai/DALL-E image tokenizer described in [34]. We also compare it with a re-implemented tokenizer in Appendix C.
items.zh: 我们将每张图像标记化为 14×14 的视觉标记网格。注意，一张图像的视觉标记数量和图像块数量相同。词汇表大小设置为 |𝒱|=8192。在我们的工作中，我们直接使用 [34] 中描述的公开可用的图像标记器。我们还在附录 C 中将其与重新实现的标记器进行了比较。

items.en: Following ViT [12], we use the standard Transformer [42] as the backbone network. So the results can be directly compared with previous work in terms of the network architecture.
items.zh: 遵循 ViT [12]，我们使用标准Transformer [42] 作为骨干网络。因此，结果可以直接与先前工作在网络架构方面进行比较。

items.en: The input of Transformer is a sequence of image patches {𝒙ip}i=1Nsuperscriptsubscriptsubscriptsuperscript𝒙𝑝𝑖𝑖1𝑁\{{\bm{x}}^{p}_{i}\}_{i=1}^{N}. The patches are then linearly projected to obtain patch embeddings 𝑬​𝒙ip𝑬subscriptsuperscript𝒙𝑝𝑖{\bm{E}}{\bm{x}}^{p}_{i}, where 𝑬∈ℝ(P2​C)×D𝑬superscriptℝsuperscript𝑃2𝐶𝐷{\bm{E}}\in\mathbb{R}^{(P^{2}C)\times D}. Moreover, we prepend a special token [S] to the input sequence. We also add standard learnable 1D position embeddings 𝑬p​o​s∈ℝN×Dsubscript𝑬𝑝𝑜𝑠superscriptℝ𝑁𝐷{\bm{E}}_{pos}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times D} to patch embeddings. The input vectors 𝑯0=[𝒆[S],𝑬​𝒙ip,…,𝑬​𝒙Np]+𝑬p​o​ssubscript𝑯0subscript𝒆[S]𝑬subscriptsuperscript𝒙𝑝𝑖…𝑬subscriptsuperscript𝒙𝑝𝑁subscript𝑬𝑝𝑜𝑠{\bm{H}}_{0}=[{\bm{e}}_{\texttt{[S]}},{\bm{E}}{\bm{x}}^{p}_{i},\dots,{\bm{E}}{\bm{x}}^{p}_{N}]+{\bm{E}}_{pos} is fed into Transformer. The encoder contains L𝐿L layers of Transformer blocks 𝑯l=Transformer​(𝑯l−1)superscript𝑯𝑙Transformersuperscript𝑯𝑙1{\bm{H}}^{l}=\mathrm{Transformer}({\bm{H}}^{l-1}), where l=1,…,L𝑙1…𝐿l=1,\dots,L. The output vectors of the last layer 𝑯L=[𝒉[S]L,𝒉1L,…,𝒉NL]superscript𝑯𝐿subscriptsuperscript𝒉𝐿[S]subscriptsuperscript𝒉𝐿1…subscriptsuperscript𝒉𝐿𝑁{\bm{H}}^{L}=[{\bm{h}}^{L}_{\texttt{[S]}},{\bm{h}}^{L}_{1},\dots,{\bm{h}}^{L}_{N}] are used as the encoded representations for the image patches, where 𝒉iLsubscriptsuperscript𝒉𝐿𝑖{\bm{h}}^{L}_{i} is the vector of the i𝑖i-th image patch.
items.zh: Transformer 的输入是一系列图像块 {x^p_i}_{i=1}^N。这些块然后被线性投影以获得块嵌入 E x^p_i，其中 E ∈ ℝ^{(P^2C)×D}。此外，我们在输入序列前添加一个特殊标记 [S]。我们还向块嵌入添加标准的可学习 1D 位置嵌入 E_pos ∈ ℝ^{N×D}。输入向量 H_0 = [e_[S], E x^p_i, …, E x^p_N] + E_pos 被馈送到Transformer。编码器包含 L 层 Transformer 块 H^l = Transformer(H^{l-1})，其中 l=1,…,L。最后一层的输出向量 H^L = [h^L_[S], h^L_1, …, h^L_N] 被用作图像块的编码表示，其中 h^L_i 是第 i 个图像块的向量。

items.en: We propose a masked image modeling (MIM) task. We randomly mask some percentage of image patches, and then predict the visual tokens that are corresponding to the masked patches.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种掩码图像建模（MIM）任务。我们随机掩码一定百分比的图像块，然后预测与被掩码块对应的视觉标记。

items.en: where 𝒟𝒟\mathcal{D} is the training corpus, ℳℳ\mathcal{M} represents randomly masked positions, and xℳsuperscript𝑥ℳx^{\mathcal{M}} is the corrupted image that is masked according to ℳℳ\mathcal{M}.
items.zh: 其中 𝒟 是训练语料库，ℳ 表示随机掩码位置，x^ℳ 是根据 ℳ 掩码的损坏图像。

items.en: Rather than randomly choosing patches for the masked positions ℳℳ\mathcal{M}, we employ blockwise masking in our work. As summarized in Algorithm 1, a block of image patches is masked each time. For each block, we set the minimum number of patches to 161616. Then we randomly choose an aspect ratio for the masking block. We repeat the above two steps until obtaining enough masked patches, i.e., 0.4​N0.4𝑁0.4N, where N𝑁N is the total number of image patches, and 0.40.40.4 is masking ratio.
items.zh: 我们不是随机选择掩码位置 ℳ 的补丁，而是在工作中采用块状掩码。如算法 1 所总结，每次掩码一个图像补丁块。对于每个块，我们将最小补丁数设置为 16。然后我们随机选择掩码块的宽高比。我们重复上述两个步骤，直到获得足够的掩码补丁，即 0.4N，其中 N 是图像补丁的总数，0.4 是掩码比例。

items.en: The MIM task is greatly inspired by masked language modeling [13], which is one of the most successful pre-training objective in natural language processing. Moreover, blockwise (or n-gram) masking is also widely applied in BERT-like models [19, 2, 35]. However, directly using pixel-level auto-encoding (i.e., recovering the pixels of masked patches) for vision pre-training pushes the model to focus on short-range dependencies and high-frequency details [34]. BEiT overcomes the above issue by predicting discrete visual tokens, which summarizes the details to high-level abstractions. Ablation studies in Section 3.3 show that our proposed method significantly outperforms pixel-level auto-encoding.
items.zh: MIM 任务深受掩码语言建模 [13] 的启发，这是自然语言处理中最成功的预训练目标之一。此外，块状（或 n-gram）掩码也广泛应用于类似 BERT 的模型 [19, 2, 35]。然而，直接使用像素级自编码（即恢复掩码补丁的像素）进行视觉预训练，会促使模型关注短程依赖和高频细节 [34]。BEiT 通过预测离散视觉令牌克服了上述问题，该令牌将细节总结为高级抽象。第 3.3 节的消融研究表明，我们提出的方法显著优于像素级自编码。

full.sec: 2.4 From the Perspective of Variational Autoencoder
full.secZh: 2.4 从变分自编码器的视角

items.en: The BEiT pre-training can be viewed as variational autoencoder [23] training. Let x𝑥x denote the original image, x~~𝑥\tilde{x} the masked image, and z𝑧z the visual tokens. Considering the evidence lower bound (ELBO) of the log-likelihood p​(x|x~)𝑝conditional𝑥~𝑥p(x|\tilde{x}), i.e., recovering the original image from its corrupted version:
items.zh: BEiT 预训练可以视为变分自编码器 [23] 训练。令 x 表示原始图像，x̃ 表示掩码图像，z 表示视觉令牌。考虑对数似然 p(x|x̃) 的证据下界 (ELBO)，即从损坏版本恢复原始图像：

items.en: where (1) qϕ​(z|x)subscript𝑞italic-ϕconditional𝑧𝑥q_{\phi}(z|x) denotes the image tokenizer that obtains visual tokens; (2) pψ​(x|z)subscript𝑝𝜓conditional𝑥𝑧p_{\psi}(x|z) decodes the original image given input visual tokens; (3) pθ​(z|x~)subscript𝑝𝜃conditional𝑧~𝑥p_{\theta}(z|\tilde{x}) recovers the visual tokens based on the masked image, which is our MIM pre-training task.
items.zh: 其中 (1) q_φ(z|x) 表示获取视觉令牌的图像分词器；(2) p_ψ(x|z) 根据输入的视觉令牌解码原始图像；(3) p_θ(z|x̃) 基于掩码图像恢复视觉令牌，这是我们的 MIM 预训练任务。

items.en: We learn the model following a two-stage procedure similar to [41, 36]. In the first stage, we obtain the image tokenizer as a discrete variational autoencoder [34]. Specifically, the first stage minimizes the reconstruction loss −𝔼zi∼qϕ​(𝐳|xi)​[log⁡pψ​(xi|zi)]subscript𝔼similar-tosubscript𝑧𝑖subscript𝑞italic-ϕconditional𝐳subscript𝑥𝑖delimited-[]subscript𝑝𝜓conditionalsubscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑧𝑖-\mathbb{E}_{z_{i}\sim q_{\phi}({\mathbf{z}}|x_{i})}[\log p_{\psi}(x_{i}|z_{i})] with an uniform prior as described in Equation (2). In the second stage, we learn the prior pθsubscript𝑝𝜃p_{\theta} while keeping qϕsubscript𝑞italic-ϕq_{\phi} and pψsubscript𝑝𝜓p_{\psi} fixed. We simplify qϕ​(𝐳|xi)subscript𝑞italic-ϕconditional𝐳subscript𝑥𝑖q_{\phi}({\mathbf{z}}|x_{i}) to a one-point distribution with the most likely visual tokens z^i=arg​maxz⁡qϕ​(z|xi)subscript^𝑧𝑖subscriptargmax𝑧subscript𝑞italic-ϕconditional𝑧subscript𝑥𝑖\hat{z}_{i}=\operatorname*{arg\,max}_{z}{q_{\phi}(z|x_{i})}. Then Equation (2) can be rewritten as:
items.zh: 我们按照类似于 [41, 36] 的两阶段过程学习模型。在第一阶段，我们获得作为离散变分自编码器 [34] 的图像分词器。具体来说，第一阶段最小化重建损失 -E_{z_i∼q_φ(z|x_i)}[log p_ψ(x_i|z_i)]，如公式 (2) 所述，使用均匀先验。在第二阶段，我们学习先验 p_θ，同时保持 q_φ 和 p_ψ 固定。我们将 q_φ(z|x_i) 简化为一个单点分布，使用最可能的视觉令牌 ẑ_i = argmax_z q_φ(z|x_i)。然后公式 (2) 可以重写为：

items.tex: \displaystyle\sum_{(x_{i},\tilde{x}_{i})\in\mathcal{D}}\big{(}\underbrace{\mathbb{E}_{z_{i}\sim q_{\phi}(z|x_{i})}[\log p_{\psi}(x_{i}|z_{i})]}_{\text{Stage 1: Visual Token Reconstruction}}~{}~{}~{}~{}~{}~{}+\underbrace{\log p_{\theta}(\hat{z}_{i}|\tilde{x}_{i})}_{\text{Stage 2: Masked Image Modeling}}\big{)}

items.en: where the second term is our BEiT pre-training objective.
items.zh: 其中第二项是我们的 BEiT 预训练目标。

items.en: The network architecture of BEiT follows that of ViT-Base [12] for a fair comparison. We use a 121212-layer Transformer with 768768768 hidden size, and 121212 attention heads. The intermediate size of feed-forward networks is 307230723072. We employ the default 16×16161616\times 16 input patch size. We directly borrow the image tokenizer trained by [34]. The vocabulary size of visual tokens is 819281928192.
items.zh: BEiT 的网络架构遵循 ViT-Base [12] 以进行公平比较。我们使用 12 层 Transformer，隐藏大小为 768，12 个注意力头。前馈网络的中间大小为 3072。我们采用默认的 16×16 输入补丁大小。我们直接借用 [34] 训练的图像分词器。视觉令牌的词汇表大小为 8192。

items.en: We pretrain BEiT on the training set of ImageNet-1K [33], which contains about 1.21.21.2M images. Our augmentation policy includes random resized cropping, horizontal flipping, color jittering [43]. Notice that we do not use the labels for self-supervised learning. We use the 224×224224224224\times 224 resolution in our experiments. So the input is split to 14×14141414\times 14 image patches, and the same amount of visual tokens. We randomly mask at most 757575 patches (i.e., roughly 40%percent4040\% of total image patches).
items.zh: 我们在 ImageNet-1K [33] 的训练集上预训练 BEiT，该数据集包含约 120 万张图像。我们的增强策略包括随机调整大小裁剪、水平翻转、颜色抖动 [43]。注意，我们未使用标签进行自监督学习。我们在实验中使用 224×224 分辨率。因此输入被分割成 14×14 个图像补丁，以及相同数量的视觉令牌。我们随机掩码最多 75 个补丁（即约占总图像补丁的 40%）。

items.en: The pre-training runs for about 500500500k steps (i.e., 800800800 epochs) with 222k batch size. Adam [24] with β1=0.9,β2=0.999formulae-sequencesubscript𝛽10.9subscript𝛽20.999\beta_{1}=0.9,\beta_{2}=0.999 is employed for optimization. The learning rate is set to 1.5e-3, with a warmup of 101010 epochs, and cosine learning rate decay. The weight decay is 0.050.050.05. We employ stochastic depth [18] with a 0.10.10.1 rate, and disable dropout. The 500500500k training steps take about five days using 161616 Nvidia Telsa V100 32GB GPU cards.
items.zh: 预训练运行约 50 万步（即 800 个 epoch），批大小为 2k。使用 Adam [24] 优化，β1=0.9, β2=0.999。学习率设置为 1.5e-3，预热 10 个 epoch，并采用余弦学习率衰减。权重衰减为 0.05。我们采用随机深度 [18]，比率为 0.1，并禁用 dropout。50 万步训练约需五天，使用 16 块 Nvidia Tesla V100 32GB GPU 卡。

items.en: We find that proper initialization is important to stabilize Transformer, especially for large-scale pre-training. We first randomly initialize all the parameters within a small range, such as [−0.02,0.02]0.020.02[-0.02,0.02]. Then, for the l𝑙l-th Transformer layer, we rescale the output matrices (i.e., the last linear projection within each sub-layer) of the self-attention module and the feed-forward network by 12​l12𝑙\frac{1}{\sqrt{2l}}.
items.zh: 我们发现适当的初始化对于稳定 Transformer 很重要，尤其是对于大规模预训练。我们首先在小区间内随机初始化所有参数，例如 [-0.02, 0.02]。然后，对于第 l 个 Transformer 层，我们将自注意力模块和前馈网络的输出矩阵（即每个子层内的最后一个线性投影）重新缩放 1/√(2l)。

full.sec: 2.6 Fine-Tuning BEiT on Downstream Vision Tasks
full.secZh: 2.6 在下游视觉任务上微调BEiT

items.en: After pre-training BEiT, we append a task layer upon the Transformer, and fine-tune the parameters on downstream tasks, like BERT. We take image classification and semantic segmentation as examples in our work. It is straightforward to leverage the pre-training-then-fine-tuning paradigm on other vision tasks with BEiT.
items.zh: 预训练 BEiT 后，我们在 Transformer 上附加一个任务层，并在下游任务上微调参数，类似于 BERT。我们在工作中以图像分类和语义分割为例。利用预训练-然后-微调范式将 BEiT 应用于其他视觉任务是直接的。

items.en: For image classification tasks, we directly employ a simple linear classifier as the task layer. Specifically, we use average pooling to aggregate the representations, and feed the global to a softmax classifier. The category probabilities are computed as softmax​(avg​({𝒉iL}i=1N​𝑾c))softmaxavgsuperscriptsubscriptsubscriptsuperscript𝒉𝐿𝑖𝑖1𝑁subscript𝑾𝑐\mathrm{softmax}(\mathrm{avg}(\{{\bm{h}}^{L}_{i}\}_{i=1}^{N}{\bm{W}}_{c})), where 𝒉iLsubscriptsuperscript𝒉𝐿𝑖{\bm{h}}^{L}_{i} is the final encoding vector of the i𝑖i-th image patch, 𝑾c∈ℝD×Csubscript𝑾𝑐superscriptℝ𝐷𝐶{\bm{W}}_{c}\in\mathbb{R}^{D\times C} is a parameter matrix, and C𝐶C is the number of labels. We maximize the likelihood of labeled data by updating the parameters of BEiT and the softmax classifier.
items.zh: 对于图像分类任务，我们直接使用简单的线性分类器作为任务层。具体来说，我们使用平均池化聚合表示，并将全局特征输入 softmax 分类器。类别概率计算为 softmax(avg({h_i^L}_{i=1}^N) W_c)，其中 h_i^L 是第 i 个图像补丁的最终编码向量，W_c ∈ R^{D×C} 是参数矩阵，C 是标签数量。我们通过更新 BEiT 和 softmax 分类器的参数来最大化标注数据的似然。

items.en: For semantic segmentation, we follow the task layer used in SETR-PUP [48]. To be specific, we use pretrained BEiT as a backbone encoder, and incorporate several deconvolution layers as decoder to produce segmentation. The model is also end-to-end fine-tuned similar to image classification.
items.zh: 对于语义分割，我们遵循 SETR-PUP [48] 中使用的任务层。具体来说，我们使用预训练的 BEiT 作为骨干编码器，并加入几个反卷积层作为解码器以生成分割结果。模型也像图像分类一样进行端到端微调。

items.en: After self-supervised pre-training, we can further train BEiT on a data-rich intermediate dataset (i.e., ImageNet-1K in our work), and then finetune the model on the target downstream tasks. Such intermediate fine-tuning is the common practice of BERT fine-tuning in NLP [32]. We directly follow the method for BEiT.
items.zh: 在自监督预训练之后，我们可以进一步在数据丰富的中间数据集（即本文中的 ImageNet-1K）上训练 BEiT，然后在目标下游任务上微调模型。这种中间微调是 NLP 中 BERT 微调的常见做法 [32]。我们直接遵循 BEiT 的方法。

items.en: We conduct full fine-tuning experiments on image classification and semantic segmentation. Moreover, we present various ablation studies for pre-training and analyze the representations learned by BEiT. We also report linear probes on ImageNet in Appendix D.
items.zh: 我们在图像分类和语义分割上进行了全微调实验。此外，我们进行了各种预训练消融研究，并分析了 BEiT 学习到的表示。我们还在附录 D 中报告了 ImageNet 上的线性探测结果。

items.en: The image classification task classifies input images to various categories. We evaluate BEiT on the ILSVRC-2012 ImageNet dataset [33] with 1k classes and 1.31.31.3M images. We directly follow the most of hyperparameters of DeiT [38] in our fine-tuning experiments for a fair comparison. We reduce fine-tuning epochs compared with training from scratch, as BEiT has been pre-trained. Accordingly, we use a larger learning rate with layer-wise decay. The detailed hyperparameters are summarized in Appendix H.
items.zh: 图像分类任务将输入图像分类到不同类别。我们在 ILSVRC-2012 ImageNet 数据集 [33] 上评估 BEiT，该数据集包含 1000 个类别和 130 万张图像。为了公平比较，我们在微调实验中直接遵循 DeiT [38] 的大部分超参数。由于 BEiT 已经预训练，我们减少了微调 epoch 数量。相应地，我们使用更大的学习率和逐层衰减。详细超参数总结在附录 H 中。

items.en: Compared with the models trained by random initialization, we find that pre-trained BEiT significantly improves performance on both datasets. BEiT improves the performance on ImageNet, which shows the effectiveness under the rich-resource setting.
items.zh: 与随机初始化的模型相比，我们发现预训练的 BEiT 在两个数据集上都显著提升了性能。BEiT 在 ImageNet 上提升了性能，显示了在丰富资源设置下的有效性。

items.en: Moreover, we compare BEiT with previous state-of-the-art self-supervised methods for Transformer, such as DINO [10], and MoCo v3 [11]. Our proposed method outperforms previous models on ImageNet fine-tuning. Among them, iGPT-1.36B [9] uses much more parameters (i.e., 1.361.361.36B vs 868686M), and ViT-JFT300M [12] is pretrained on larger corpus (i.e., 300300300M vs 1.31.31.3M), while others pretrain ViT-Base on ImageNet-1K. iGPT-1.36B and ViT-JFT300M are the most comparable methods, which also follows auto-encoding pre-training for vision Transformer. Specifically, iGPT uses clustered image tokens as both input and output for image GPT or image BERT. In contrast, we use image patches as input to preserve raw pixels, and employ discrete visual tokens as a prediction bottleneck. ViT-JFT300 predicts the mean, 3-bit color of each masked patch, rather than visual tokens learned by discrete VAE. We also pretrain the self-supervised tasks of BEiT and DINO in a multi-task learning manner, which is presented in Appendix E.
items.zh: 此外，我们将 BEiT 与之前最先进的 Transformer 自监督方法（如 DINO [10] 和 MoCo v3 [11]）进行比较。我们提出的方法在 ImageNet 微调上优于之前的模型。其中，iGPT-1.36B [9] 使用更多参数（即 13.6 亿 vs 8600 万），ViT-JFT300M [12] 在更大的语料库上预训练（即 3 亿 vs 130 万），而其他方法在 ImageNet-1K 上预训练 ViT-Base。iGPT-1.36B 和 ViT-JFT300M 是最可比的方法，它们也遵循视觉 Transformer 的自编码预训练。具体来说，iGPT 使用聚类图像令牌作为图像 GPT 或图像 BERT 的输入和输出。相比之下，我们使用图像补丁作为输入以保留原始像素，并使用离散视觉令牌作为预测瓶颈。ViT-JFT300 预测每个掩码补丁的平均值、3 位颜色，而不是由离散 VAE 学习的视觉令牌。我们还以多任务学习方式预训练了 BEiT 和 DINO 的自监督任务，详见附录 E。

items.en: In addition, we evaluate our proposed method with intermediate fine-tuning. In other words, we first pretrain BEiT in a self-supervised manner, and then fine-tune the pretrained model on ImageNet with labeled data. The results show that BEiT is complementary to supervised pre-training, achieving additional gain after intermediate fine-tuning on ImageNet.
items.zh: 此外，我们通过中间微调评估了我们提出的方法。换句话说，我们首先以自监督方式预训练 BEiT，然后在 ImageNet 上使用标注数据微调预训练模型。结果表明，BEiT 与监督预训练互补，在 ImageNet 上经过中间微调后获得了额外的增益。

items.en: After fine-tuning with resolution 224×224224224224\times 224, we additionally fine-tune the model on 384×384384384384\times 384 images by 101010 more epochs. We follow the standard higher-resolution setting of DeiT [38], except using fewer epochs. Notice that we keep patch size the same for both 224×224224224224\times 224 and 384×384384384384\times 384 images. So the input sequence length of Transformers becomes longer for higher resolutions. Table 1 shows that higher resolution improves the BEiT results by 1+limit-from11+ points on ImageNet. More importantly, BEiT384 pretrained on ImageNet-1K even outperforms supervised pre-training ViT384 that uses ImageNet-22K, when they use the same input resolution.
items.zh: 在224×224分辨率微调后，我们额外在384×384图像上微调模型10个epoch。我们遵循DeiT [38]的标准高分辨率设置，但使用更少的epoch。注意，对于224×224和384×384图像，我们保持patch大小相同。因此，对于更高分辨率，Transformer的输入序列长度变长。表1显示，更高分辨率使BEiT在ImageNet上的结果提升1+个百分点。更重要的是，在ImageNet-1K上预训练的BEiT384甚至优于使用ImageNet-22K进行监督预训练的ViT384，当它们使用相同的输入分辨率时。

items.en: We further scale up BEiT to the large size (same as ViT-L). As shown in Table 1, ViT384-L is worse than ViT384 on ImageNet, when training from scratch. The results verifies the data-hungry issue of vision Transformers. Supervised pre-training on ImageNet-22K partially relieves the issue, where ViT384-L finally outperforms ViT384 by 1.21.21.2. In comparison, BEiT-L is better than BEiT by 2.02.02.0, and BEiT384-L outperforms BEiT384 by 1.71.71.7. In other words, the benefits of scaling up BEiT from base to large are greater than supervised pre-training with ImageNet-22K. More importantly, comparing between BEiT384 with ViT384 that conducts supervised pre-training on ImageNet-22K, the improvements of BEiT become greater along with scaling the size from base (i.e., 0.60.60.6) to large (i.e., 1.11.11.1). The results suggest that BEiT tends to help more for extremely larger models (such as 1B, or 10B), especially when labeled data are insufficient222[47] report that supervised pre-training of a 1.8B-size vision Transformer requires billions of labeled images. to conduct supervised pre-training333Appendix B shows that BEiT fine-tuned on ImageNet-22K (14M) can match the performance of supervised pre-training on Google’s in-house JFT-3B [47], while using 214x less labels. We also demonstrate that large-size BEiT fine-tuned on 70M labeled images can achieve 89.5%percent89.589.5\% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet and 58.4%percent58.458.4\% mIoU on ADE20K, creating new state-of-the-art results for large-size vision Transformers. for such large models.
items.zh: 我们进一步将BEiT扩展到大型（与ViT-L相同）。如表1所示，当从头训练时，ViT384-L在ImageNet上比ViT384差。结果验证了视觉Transformer的数据饥饿问题。在ImageNet-22K上的监督预训练部分缓解了该问题，其中ViT384-L最终比ViT384好1.2。相比之下，BEiT-L比BEiT好2.0，BEiT384-L比BEiT384好1.7。换句话说，将BEiT从base扩展到large的好处大于使用ImageNet-22K进行监督预训练。更重要的是，比较BEiT384与在ImageNet-22K上进行监督预训练的ViT384，BEiT的改进随着规模从base（即0.6）增加到large（即1.1）而变得更大。结果表明，BEiT倾向于对极大的模型（如1B或10B）更有帮助，特别是当标记数据不足以进行监督预训练时（注：[47]报告称，对1.8B大小的视觉Transformer进行监督预训练需要数十亿张标记图像。附录B显示，在ImageNet-22K（14M）上微调的BEiT可以匹配在谷歌内部JFT-3B [47]上进行监督预训练的性能，同时使用的标签少214倍。我们还证明，在70M标记图像上微调的大型BEiT可以在ImageNet上达到89.5%的top-1准确率，在ADE20K上达到58.4%的mIoU，为大型视觉Transformer创造了新的最先进结果。）。

items.capEn: Table 2: Convergence curves of training DeiT from scratch and fine-tuning BEiT on ImageNet-1K.
items.capZh: 表2：在ImageNet-1K上从头训练DeiT和微调BEiT的收敛曲线。

items.en: Semantic segmentation aims to predict a corresponding class for each pixel of the input image. We evaluate BEiT on the ADE20K benchmark [49] with 252525K images and 150150150 semantic categories. We report the metric of mean Intersection of Union (mIoU) averaged over all semantic categories. As presented in Section 2.6, we directly follow the task layer and the most of hyperparameters described in SETR-PUP [48]. On ADE20K, we use Adam [24] as the optimizer. The learning rate is set to 1e-3 with layer-wise decay similar to image classification. We conduct fine-tuning for 160K steps. The batch size is 161616. The detailed hyperparameters are described in Appendix I.
items.zh: 语义分割旨在为输入图像的每个像素预测相应的类别。我们在ADE20K基准[49]上评估BEiT，该基准包含25K张图像和150个语义类别。我们报告所有语义类别上的平均交并比（mIoU）指标。如第2.6节所述，我们直接遵循SETR-PUP [48]中描述的任务层和大部分超参数。在ADE20K上，我们使用Adam [24]作为优化器。学习率设置为1e-3，并采用类似于图像分类的逐层衰减。我们进行160K步的微调。批量大小为16。详细超参数在附录I中描述。

items.en: As shown in Table 3, we compare BEiT with supervised pre-training that relies on labeled data of ImageNet. We find that our proposed method achieves better performance than supervised pre-training, although BEiT does not require manual annotations for pre-training. Moreover, we employ intermediate fine-tuning for BEiT on ImageNet, i.e., we first fine-tune pretrained BEiT on ImageNet, and then fine-tune the model on ADE20K. The results indicate that intermediate fine-tuning further improves BEiT on semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 如表3所示，我们将BEiT与依赖ImageNet标记数据的监督预训练进行比较。我们发现，尽管BEiT不需要人工标注进行预训练，但所提出的方法取得了比监督预训练更好的性能。此外，我们对BEiT在ImageNet上采用中间微调，即首先在ImageNet上微调预训练的BEiT，然后在ADE20K上微调模型。结果表明，中间微调进一步提高了BEiT在语义分割上的性能。

items.en: We conduct ablation studies to analyze the contributions of each component in BEiT. The models are evaluated on image classification (i.e., ImageNet) and semantic segmentation (i.e., ADE20K). We set the default pre-training steps to 300300300 epochs for the ablation studies, which is 37.537.537.5% of the total steps used in the previous experiments.
items.zh: 我们进行消融研究以分析BEiT中每个组件的贡献。模型在图像分类（即ImageNet）和语义分割（即ADE20K）上进行评估。我们将消融研究的默认预训练步数设置为300个epoch，占之前实验总步数的37.5%。

items.en: We show that the self-attention mechanism in BEiT can separate objects, even though our pre-training does not rely on any manual annotation at all. Similar properties are also observed by [10]. The probing images are taken from the MS COCO [26] corpus to avoid appearing in the pre-training data.
items.zh: 我们表明，BEiT中的自注意力机制可以分离物体，尽管我们的预训练完全不依赖任何人工标注。类似的性质也被[10]观察到。探测图像取自MS COCO [26]语料库，以避免出现在预训练数据中。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Self-attention map for different reference points. The self-attention mechanism in BEiT is able to separate objects, although self-supervised pre-training does not use manual annotations.
items.capZh: 图2：不同参考点的自注意力图。BEiT中的自注意力机制能够分离物体，尽管自监督预训练不使用人工标注。

items.en: As shown in Figure 2, we plot the self-attention map for different reference points within an image. The visualizations are produced by attention scores computed via query-key product in the last layer. For each reference point, we use the corresponding patch as query, and show which patch it attends to. After pre-training, BEiT learns to distinguish semantic regions using self-attention heads, without any task-specific supervision. The property partially indicates the reason why BEiT is able to help downstream tasks. Such knowledge acquired by BEiT potentially improves the generalization ability of fine-tuned models, especially on small-scale datasets.
items.zh: 如图2所示，我们绘制了图像内不同参考点的自注意力图。可视化是通过最后一层中查询-键乘积计算的注意力分数生成的。对于每个参考点，我们使用相应的patch作为查询，并显示它关注哪些patch。预训练后，BEiT学会使用自注意力头区分语义区域，无需任何任务特定的监督。该性质部分说明了BEiT为何能够帮助下游任务。BEiT获得的这种知识可能提高微调模型的泛化能力，尤其是在小规模数据集上。

items.en: Various methods have been introduced over the years to pretrain vision models in a self-supervised manner. Pioneering works design clever pretext tasks, such as predicting the patch orderings [30], colorization [46], and predicting rotation angles [21]. In addition, [40] propose to mask some patches within an image, and classify whether the masked patches are real or fake for each masked position. The method is similar to the masked version of Jigsaw pre-training [30]. The recent strand of research follows contrastive paradigm [43, 31, 16, 3, 17, 7, 5]. The models typically regard various data augmentations as different views of an image, and then make the representations of positive pairs similar while pushing negative pairs away. In order to obtain enough informative negative samples in contrastive learning, the methods usually rely on large memory banks [43, 17] or large batch size [7]. BYOL [14] and SimSiam [6] further eliminate the requirement of negative samples, using various techniques to avoid representation collapse. Another strand of methods use clustering to organize image examples [4, 1, 8, 28].
items.zh: 多年来，人们引入了各种方法以自监督方式预训练视觉模型。开创性工作设计了巧妙的预文本任务，例如预测patch顺序[30]、着色[46]和预测旋转角度[21]。此外，[40]提出在图像中掩码一些patch，并针对每个掩码位置分类掩码patch是真实还是虚假。该方法类似于掩码版本的Jigsaw预训练[30]。最近的研究遵循对比范式[43, 31, 16, 3, 17, 7, 5]。这些模型通常将各种数据增强视为图像的不同视图，然后使正对的表示相似，同时推开负对。为了在对比学习中获得足够的信息性负样本，这些方法通常依赖大型记忆库[43, 17]或大批量大小[7]。BYOL [14]和SimSiam [6]进一步消除了负样本的需求，使用各种技术避免表示坍塌。另一类方法使用聚类来组织图像示例[4, 1, 8, 28]。

items.en: Pre-training vision Transformers has received significant attention recently due to the data-hungry issue. iGPT [9] first creates a 9-bit color palette by k-means clustering RGB pixels, and then uses the clustered tokens to represent images. Next iGPT uses the tasks of BERT and GPT to pretrain Transformers. In comparison, our proposed method uses image patches as input without losing pixel-level information. Moreover, our visual tokens are obtained by discrete VAE instead of clustering. ViT [12] conducts a preliminary exploration with the masked patch prediction task, which predicts the 3-bit mean color of the masked patches. [12] also report that pixel-level auto-encoding performs worse, although it is the most straightforward translation of BERT from NLP to CV. Rather than using heuristically designed pre-training tasks, our proposed model leverages visual tokens learned by discrete VAE, which not only achieves better performance but also is better theoretically motivated. Apart from masked auto-encoding, other mainstream research works use contrastive learning [11, 44], and self-distillation [10]. In comparison, BEiT can achieve several times of improvement in terms of pre-training throughput (Appendix E), and memory consumption. The advantages make BEiT appealing to scale up vision Transformers.
items.zh: 由于数据饥饿问题，预训练视觉Transformer最近受到了显著关注。iGPT [9]首先通过k-means聚类RGB像素创建9位调色板，然后使用聚类后的token表示图像。接着iGPT使用BERT和GPT的任务预训练Transformer。相比之下，我们提出的方法使用图像patch作为输入，不丢失像素级信息。此外，我们的视觉token是通过离散VAE获得的，而不是聚类。ViT [12]对掩码patch预测任务进行了初步探索，预测掩码patch的3位平均颜色。[12]还报告说，像素级自编码表现更差，尽管它是将BERT从NLP直接翻译到CV的最直接方式。与使用启发式设计的预训练任务不同，我们提出的模型利用离散VAE学习的视觉token，这不仅实现了更好的性能，而且在理论上更有依据。除了掩码自编码，其他主流研究工作使用对比学习[11, 44]和自蒸馏[10]。相比之下，BEiT在预训练吞吐量（附录E）和内存消耗方面可以实现数倍的改进。这些优势使BEiT在扩展视觉Transformer方面具有吸引力。

items.en: We introduce a self-supervised pre-training framework for vision Transformers, achieving strong fine-tuning results on downstream tasks, such as image classification, and semantic segmentation. We show that the proposed method is critical to make BERT-like pre-training (i.e., auto-encoding with masked input) work well for image Transformers. We also present the intriguing property of automatically acquired knowledge about semantic regions, without using any human-annotated data. In the future, we would like to scale up BEiT pre-training in terms of data size and model size. Moreover, we will conduct multimodal pre-training in a more unified way, using the similar objectives and the shared architecture for texts and images.
items.zh: 我们介绍了一种用于视觉Transformer的自监督预训练框架，在下游任务（如图像分类和语义分割）上取得了强大的微调结果。我们表明，所提出的方法对于使类似BERT的预训练（即带掩码输入的自编码）在图像Transformer上良好工作至关重要。我们还展示了自动获取语义区域知识的引人入胜的性质，无需使用任何人工标注数据。未来，我们希望在数据规模和模型规模上扩展BEiT预训练。此外，我们将以更统一的方式进行多模态预训练，对文本和图像使用相似的目标和共享架构。

items.en: We would like to acknowledge Yue Cao, Han Hu, Hang Hua, Jingdong Wang, Zheng Zhang for the helpful discussions, and Yaru Hao for some analysis experiments using [15].
items.zh: 我们要感谢Yue Cao、Han Hu、Hang Hua、Jingdong Wang、Zheng Zhang的有益讨论，以及Yaru Hao使用[15]进行的一些分析实验。
